0.title: Async vs Sync Processing
0.context: High volume of requests causing timeouts.
0.decision: Use asynchronous processing via queues where immediate response is not required.

2.rule: Avoid critical path dependencies on control plane APIs.

3.title: S3 Partial Outage
3.description: Partial availability issues affecting specific API calls.

4.title: DynamoDB Hot Partition Issue
4.description: Performance degradation due to uneven access patterns.

5.title: AWS S3 Outage in US-EAST-1
5.root_cause: Human error during capacity removal command
lessons_learned: Limit blast radius of control plane operations
